title: microsorum krayanense
intro: Microsorum krayanense, also known as Krayan fern or Krayan water fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Microsorum krayanense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe skin irritations. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
